policy.reason: The launch gate audits production runtime dependencies. Dev-only and optional build-time findings remain tracked here and in readiness docs.

exceptions.exposure: optional build-time PWA service-worker generation only; not installed in production runtime audit
exceptions.reason: The high serialize-javascript finding is patched by the root override to 7.0.5. Workbox still carries moderate ajv audit findings in optional build tooling; forcing npm's suggested downgrade would be higher functional risk than tracking the build-only exposure.
exceptions.mitigation: PWA generation is exercised by build tests; no untrusted user input is passed to Workbox validation; production runtime audit omits optional/dev dependencies.

exceptions.reason: Latest Storybook major is incompatible with the current Vite 6/React toolchain without a larger Storybook migration. Not production runtime exposed.
exceptions.mitigation: Storybook is not part of production build or runtime audit; revisit with Storybook/Vite major upgrade.

exceptions.reason: Audit's fix points to a package downgrade. Not production runtime exposed.
exceptions.mitigation: Excluded from production runtime audit; monitor upstream.
